title: Bedroom Environment Audit
description: Audit your bedroom environment across four key areas. Check off each item you have addressed, then prioritize the unchecked ones.
instructions: Walk through your bedroom and honestly assess each item. Check off what is already in place. The unchecked items are your action list for creating an optimal sleep environment.

items.label: Breathable bedding materials (cotton, linen, or moisture-wicking)
Option to adjust layers (extra blankets available but not always used)
Blackout curtains or room-darkening shades installed
No LED lights from electronics visible (covered or removed)
Dim, red-toned nightlight in bathroom for nighttime trips
Room is as quiet as possible
White noise machine or fan available if external noise is present
Phone on silent or do-not-disturb mode
Mattress supports my body comfortably (no sagging or pressure points)
Pillow properly supports head and neck alignment
Bed linens are clean and comfortable
Room is used primarily for sleep (not work or entertainment)

disclaimer: This audit is for educational purposes. Small changes can make a big difference — you don't need to address everything at once. Start with one or two items that are easiest to fix.
